metadata.ansatz: shared flexible SU(N) Chebyshev spectral impurity
metadata.hamiltonian: -1/2 Delta_X + 1/2 omega^2 Tr X^2 + g Tr X^4

sampler.algorithm: scrambled Sobol Gaussian importance sampling in orthonormal traceless eigenvalue coordinates

training_samples.method: deterministic LBFGS warm start of the alpha/cubic envelope inside the full shared Chebyshev ansatz

grid.type: midpoint tensor grid in three traceless coordinates

training.method: fixed-proposal Adam on the full flexible ansatz

validation_summary.note: The SU(2)/SU(3) radial finite-difference energies are external benchmarks only.  Training and evaluation use the same flexible Chebyshev ansatz and Sobol-Gaussian importance Monte Carlo estimator for every N.
